iterate_latest.summary: Added a formatting toolbar (bold/italic/strike/inline-code, H1-H3, bullet+ordered lists, blockquote, code-block, horizontal-rule, link, undo/redo) to the SmartViewer markdown editor. TipTap is headless, so the buttons were previously absent; the bar wires existing StarterKit commands, mirrors the live selection via aria-pressed, and adds no new serialized construct (boundary unchanged).

surface_verification.evidence: 5/5 passed in Chromium against an isolated worktree Vite (BASE_URL=http://localhost:5199, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local); API route-mocked

behaviors.behavior: AC1 toolbar renders core buttons when an editor is present
behaviors.evidence: MarkdownEditorToolbar.test.tsx 'renders core formatting buttons' + E2E button visibility PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC1 toolbar hidden during loading/load_error/diff phases
behaviors.evidence: same `showEditor` boolean gates the editor surface div; modal phase tests exercise loading + diff (no editor)

behaviors.behavior: AC2 a toggle button applies its StarterKit command into the serialized markdown
behaviors.evidence: E2E select-all + toolbar Bold -> `**` appears in the pre-save diff PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC3 toggle buttons mirror the live selection via aria-pressed (bold + heading)

behaviors.evidence: identical data-driven `onClick={() => run(editor)}` path (bold tested as representative); the commands themselves are proven by markdownTiptap.test.ts round-trip

behaviors.behavior: AC3 undo/redo disabled via editor.can() when history is empty
behaviors.evidence: MarkdownEditorToolbar.test.tsx 'disables undo when the history is empty' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC4 link button prompts for a URL; cancel is a safe no-op
behaviors.evidence: MarkdownEditorToolbar.test.tsx 'opens a URL prompt ... cancel is a safe no-op' PASSED
MarkdownEditorToolbar.test.tsx 'renders nothing when the editor is null' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC5 no new serialized construct (lossy-warn surface unchanged)
behaviors.evidence: markdownTiptap round-trip + detectLossyConstructs tests remain green (11) — toolbar adds no construct
